2: And forget not all his benefits:
4: Who crowneth thee with lovingkindness and tender mercies;
5: So that So that thy youth is renewed like the eagle's.
7: His acts unto the children of Israel.
8: Slow to anger, and plenteous in mercy.
9: Neither will he keep his anger his anger for ever.
10: Nor rewarded us according to our iniquities.
11: So So great is his mercy toward them that fear him.

13: So So the LORD LORD pitieth them that fear him.

15: As a flower of the field, so he flourisheth.
